chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No. 464 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of M.A No.8968/2021. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 08.08.2023 Mr. Zahoor Shah, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. Mr. Imran Rana, Advocate for Respondent No.6. -x-x-x-x-x- None present for the applicant except Addl. P.G, Sindh as well as counsel for respondent No.6. Same was the position of last date. It appear that the purpose, for which instant application was filed, has been served or the applicant has lost his interest in the proceedings, therefore, he and his counsel have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing it vigilantly. Consequently and in view of above, instant Criminal Misc. Application is hereby dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
